'''ân-n-z''' ('''kananaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:stallfeed|stallfeed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-n-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stallfeed|stallfeed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-n-z
|-
! Lemma
| kananaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinanaz|thinanaz]] || [[word:jinanaz|jinanaz]] || [[word:shinanaz|shinanaz]] || [[word:kinanaz|kinanaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunanaz|thuthunanaz]] || [[word:jujunanaz|jujunanaz]] || [[word:shushunanaz|shushunanaz]] || [[word:kukunanaz|kukunanaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunanaz|thunanaz]] || [[word:junanaz|junanaz]] || [[word:shunanaz|shunanaz]] || [[word:kunanaz|kunanaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunanaz|thunanaz]] || [[word:junanaz|junanaz]] || [[word:shunanaz|shunanaz]] || [[word:kunanaz|kunanaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenanaz|thenanaz]] || [[word:jenanaz|jenanaz]] || [[word:shenanaz|shenanaz]] || [[word:kenanaz|kenanaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonanaz|thothonanaz]] || [[word:jojonanaz|jojonanaz]] || [[word:shoshonanaz|shoshonanaz]] || [[word:kokonanaz|kokonanaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonanaz|thonanaz]] || [[word:jonanaz|jonanaz]] || [[word:shonanaz|shonanaz]] || [[word:konanaz|konanaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonanaz|thonanaz]] || [[word:jonanaz|jonanaz]] || [[word:shonanaz|shonanaz]] || [[word:konanaz|konanaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnanaz|thĂŠnanaz]] || [[word:jĂŠnanaz|jĂŠnanaz]] || [[word:shĂŠnanaz|shĂŠnanaz]] || [[word:kĂŠnanaz|kĂŠnanaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathananaz|thathananaz]] || [[word:jajananaz|jajananaz]] || [[word:shashananaz|shashananaz]] || [[word:kakananaz|kakananaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thananaz|thananaz]] || [[word:jananaz|jananaz]] || [[word:shananaz|shananaz]] || [[word:kananaz|kananaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thananaz|thananaz]] || [[word:jananaz|jananaz]] || [[word:shananaz|shananaz]] || [[word:kananaz|kananaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shananaz|shananaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshananaz|goshananaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishananaz|gokishananaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shananaznĂŒ|shananaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshananaznknĂŒ|goshananaznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishananaznĂŒ|gokishananaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shananazshĂ«|shananazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshananaznkshĂ«|goshananaznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishananazshĂ«|gokishananazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shananazro|shananazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshananaznkro|goshananaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishananazro|gokishananazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shananazmu|shananazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshananaznkmu|goshananaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishananazmu|gokishananazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shananazsher|shananazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshananaznksher|goshananaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishananazsher|gokishananazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shananazng|shananazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshananaznkng|goshananaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishananazng|gokishananazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shananazya|shananazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshananaznkya|goshananaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishananazya|gokishananazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shananazyam|shananazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshananaznkyam|goshananaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishananazyam|gokishananazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shananaznĂŒshĂ«|shananaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshananaznknĂŒshĂ«|goshananaznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishananaznĂŒshĂ«|gokishananaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shananaznĂŒro|shananaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshananaznknĂŒro|goshananaznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishananaznĂŒro|gokishananaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shananaznĂŒmu|shananaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshananaznknĂŒmu|goshananaznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishananaznĂŒmu|gokishananaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shananazshĂ«nĂŒ|shananazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshananaznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshananaznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishananazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishananazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shananazshĂ«ro|shananazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshananaznkshĂ«ro|goshananaznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishananazshĂ«ro|gokishananazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shananazshĂ«mu|shananazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshananaznkshĂ«mu|goshananaznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishananazshĂ«mu|gokishananazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shananazronĂŒ|shananazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshananaznkronĂŒ|goshananaznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishananazronĂŒ|gokishananazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shananazroshĂ«|shananazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshananaznkroshĂ«|goshananaznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishananazroshĂ«|gokishananazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shananazromu|shananazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshananaznkromu|goshananaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishananazromu|gokishananazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shananazmunĂŒ|shananazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshananaznkmunĂŒ|goshananaznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishananazmunĂŒ|gokishananazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shananazmushĂ«|shananazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshananaznkmushĂ«|goshananaznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishananazmushĂ«|gokishananazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shananazmuro|shananazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshananaznkmuro|goshananaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishananazmuro|gokishananazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|97f1258}}
